description: Your site recently underwent an accessibility and storage audit. Clean up the Media Library and adjust global Media Settings. Disable the organization of uploads into month- and year-based folders and set the Thumbnail size to 200x200. Permanently delete the images 'Promo Banner Spring 2024', 'Black Friday Sale Old', and 'Holiday Greetings 2023'. Update the Alternative Text for the following images exactly as specified: 'Headshot CEO Sarah' to 'Headshot of CEO Sarah Jenkins smiling', 'Accessibility Diagram v2' to 'Diagram showing WCAG contrast ratio requirements', 'New York Office Lobby' to 'Modern office lobby with reception desk and plants', and 'Quarterly Revenue Chart' to 'Bar chart showing Q3 revenue growth of 15 percent'.

alt_texts.ceo: Headshot of CEO Sarah Jenkins smiling
alt_texts.diagram: Diagram showing WCAG contrast ratio requirements
alt_texts.lobby: Modern office lobby with reception desk and plants
alt_texts.chart: Bar chart showing Q3 revenue growth of 15 percent
